reasoning: The order is marked Complete with the item shown as shipped, but there is no visible tracking information or proof of delivery on the order view. The customer claims non-receipt, and payment was made via Check/Money Order. Before issuing a refund, this requires investigation into the shipment (carrier, tracking, delivery confirmation) and potential fraud or delivery issues. Escalating to logistics/fulfillment or a supervisor is appropriate prior to approving or denying the refund.
